message:
feat: add TB-scale multi-fragment query support

Add manifest parser, page processor, partial aggregates, k-way merge,
Fragment DO with pooled fan-out, and NDJSON response streaming to
support querying Lance datasets with hundreds of fragments across
TB-scale data.

Key design decisions:
- Fragment DOs use a dynamic pooled model (max 20 per datacenter) with
  active slot tracking to avoid concurrent queries queueing on the same
  DO. Falls back to local sequential scan when pool is exhausted.
- Fragment DOs cache footers in SQLite across hibernation cycles so
  repeated scans of the same fragments skip metadata reads.
- Query DOs refresh stale footer caches on wake by comparing timestamps
  returned from Master DO during re-registration.
- WasmExports interface now exposes buffer SIMD aggregates and fragment
  reader functions from the Zig binary (no WASM rebuild needed).

New files: manifest.ts, page-processor.ts, partial-agg.ts, merge.ts,
fragment-do.ts, and tests for each.

files.patch:
@@ -10,12 +10,17 @@ bucket_name = "metal0-data"
 [durable_objects]
 bindings = [
   { name = "MASTER_DO", class_name = "MasterDO" },
-  { name = "QUERY_DO", class_name = "QueryDO" }
+  { name = "QUERY_DO", class_name = "QueryDO" },
+  { name = "FRAGMENT_DO", class_name = "FragmentDO" }
 ]
 
 [[migrations]]
 tag = "v1"
 new_classes = ["MasterDO", "QueryDO"]
 
+[[migrations]]
+tag = "v2"
+new_classes = ["FragmentDO"]
+
 [wasm_modules]
 LANCEQL_WASM = "src/wasm/lanceql.wasm"
